description: Set 2. Introduces five new card classes beyond Agent: Organism (hatch a full .egg), Rapplication (run a .egg one-shot), Action (canned prompt, no agent binding), Stadium (geofenced public POI — only plays at the location), Sense (install a translation overlay).

cards.name: Spine Map
cards.tagline: Hatches SpineDAG. Map the spine of any folder, file, or prose.

cards.name: WildhavenCEO
cards.tagline: Hatches a CEO workspace operator. Talk to the workspace.

cards.name: BookFactory: Run
cards.tagline: One-shot — runs the rapplication without permanent install.
cards.prompt: Run the BookFactory rapplication on the source I'll paste. Stream the chapter back. Don't install permanently.

cards.name: Quick Take
cards.tagline: One sentence. No preamble. No agent binding.
cards.prompt: One sentence on what's happening with my work right now. No preamble. No bullet list. Just the sentence.

cards.name: Mirror Soul
cards.tagline: Recite my soul. Show me what you think I value.
cards.prompt: Read my soul.md. Don't summarize — paraphrase the load-bearing principles back to me, in your own words. I want to know which of my stated values you actually internalized.

cards.name: Blue Bottle — Mission
cards.tagline: Geofenced public stadium. Plays only when you're there.
cards.prompt_on_arrive: I just checked in at Blue Bottle Mint Plaza. Cafe-focus mode. Surface my pinned tasks, hide noise, and don't ask me clarifying questions until I prompt — assume I'm context-rich for the next hour.

cards.name: SF Public Library — Main
cards.tagline: Geofenced. Research mode unlocks at the library.

location.name: San Francisco Public Library — Main Branch

cards.prompt_on_arrive: I'm at the main library. Research mode. I'll name a topic — go wide, cite, and queue up follow-up searches. No summaries until I ask.

cards.name: Haiku Energy
cards.tagline: Equip the haiku sense. Same response, 5/7/5.
